Advanced Battery Materials & Electrolyte Components

Battery-grade salts, solvents, additives, electrolytes, and solid-state materials supporting lithium-ion and next-generation energy storage systems.

Lithium-IonRaw MaterialsAdditivesNext-GenSolid-State

Lithium-Ion Electrolytes

Pre-mixed and custom electrolyte baselines for NCM-Gr, NCM-Si/Gr, NCM-Li, LCO-Gr, LFP, NCA, LMR, and high-voltage systems.

Low-Temperature Electrolytes

Electrolyte baselines designed for discharge performance at extremely low temperatures, including -70°C evaluation conditions.

High-Ni Si/Graphite Systems

Formulations supporting high-nickel cathodes and Si/Gr anodes with improved capacity retention versus baseline electrolytes.

Sodium-Ion High-Rate Cycling

Sodium-ion electrolyte systems evaluated under demanding high-rate cycling conditions, including 1C/1C testing and high-rate protocols.

High-Rate Lithium-Ion Electrolytes

Formulations targeting aggressive rate capability, including fast-charge and high-power operation such as 6C charge / 10C discharge screening windows.

Custom Formulations

Application-specific electrolyte development for research, screening, and pilot-scale evaluation, including salt, solvent, and additive optimization.

Solid-State Battery Materials

Polymer Electrolytes

PEO-based systems, PVDF / PVDF-HFP systems, and polymer-salt complexes.

Oxide Electrolytes

LLZO, LATP, LAGP and related ceramic electrolyte systems.

Sulfide Electrolytes

LGPS, argyrodite-type materials, and Li2S-P2S5 systems.
